message.content:
@startuml
actor "Ship Captain" as SC1 at top left
participant ":System\n<<interface>>\n{abstract}" as S1 at right

SC1 ->> S1 : 1 wants to check the audit trail of a given container of a given cargo manifest
S1 -->> SC1 : 2 asks for data(cargo manifest id, container id)
SC1 ->> S1 : 3 inserts needed data
S1 -->> SC1 : 4 returns the audit trail in chronological order

note over SC1,S1 #lightyellow 
    The ShipCaptain initiates an interaction by requesting access  
    or information about specific containers within their assigned manifests.  

    This could involve checking status updates on shipments under his/her command etc.. 

end note


@enduml
